_provenance.source: Hand-authored from flow-studio crates/flow-adapter-* registry. Sync via scripts/sync-spec-from-flow-studio.sh once the flow-studio JSON-Schema generator lands.

refusal_categories.name: credential.read_secret
refusal_categories.description: Reading credentials, secrets, API keys, or any sensitive auth material directly into the graph.

refusal_categories.name: shell.exec_unrestricted
refusal_categories.description: Arbitrary or unrestricted shell execution outside the curated shell allowlist (run-command, git, npm, pnpm, cargo, kubectl, curl).

refusal_categories.name: external.http_post
refusal_categories.description: Posting data to arbitrary external HTTP endpoints not gated by an audited adapter.

refusal_categories.name: network.upload_file
refusal_categories.description: Uploading user files to external services or arbitrary network destinations.
